summary: TWO_COLUMN Schwarz-Christoffel map f'(z)=z^(-2/3)(1-z)^(-2/3) from upper half-plane to equilateral triangle. LEFT ComplexPlane with GREY horizontal grid lines y=0.1, 0.4, 0.8, 1.3 + RED real-axis + GREEN/ORANGE corner dots at z=0, 1. RIGHT shows image via numerical integration (200-pt) in BLUE→YELLOW gradient. ValueTracker t_tr sweeps YELLOW probe.
